# [olivergoodman.github.io](https://olivergoodman.github.io/)


# Steps to set up
1. [Jekyll installation](https://jekyllrb.com/docs/installation/macos/) to get ruby installed
2. Run `bundle update` (see best practices [here](https://www.viget.com/articles/bundler-best-practices))
3. Double check version for ruby, bundler, jekyll
4. Committing to master will run the Jekyll GitHub action to publish to GitHub Pages
